column1: Question Bank API Test
column4:
- Create a simple question without options - should return 201
- Create a choice question with options - should return 201 with 4 options
- Reject question missing content - should return 422
- Reject question with invalid response type - should return 422
- Get all questions - should return 200 with list
- Filter questions by category - should return 200 with filtered list
- Filter questions by response type - should return 200 with filtered list
- Get question by ID - should return 200 with matching question
- Get question with options - should return 200 with options included
- Get nonexistent question - should return 404
- Update question content - should return 200 with updated fields
- Update choice options - should return 200 with new options
- Update nonexistent question - should return 404
- Delete question - should return 204 and verify deletion with 404
- Delete choice question cascades options - should return 204
- Delete nonexistent question - should return 404

column1: Survey Template API Test
column4:
- Create a template - should return 201 with template_id
- Create a template with attached questions - should return 201 with 2 questions
- Create template with question order - should preserve display order
- Reject template missing title - should return 422
- Create public template - should return 201 with is_public=True
- Get all templates - should return 200 with list
- Filter to only public templates - should return 200 with filtered list
- Get templates with question count - should include question_count field
- Get template by ID - should return 200 with matching template
- Get template with questions - should include full question details
- Get nonexistent template - should return 404
- Update template title - should return 200 with updated fields
- Update template questions - should return 200 with new question list
- Update template visibility - should toggle is_public status
- Update nonexistent template - should return 404
- Delete template - should return 204 and verify deletion with 404
- Delete template preserves questions - questions should still exist after deletion
- Delete nonexistent template - should return 404
- Duplicate template - should return 201 with new template_id and same questions
- Duplicate nonexistent template - should return 404

column1: Survey Assignment API Test
column4:
- Assign survey to single user - should return 201 with assignment_id and status="pending"
- Assign survey to multiple users - should return 201 with list of 3 assignments
- Assign survey with due date - should set due_date on assignment
- Cannot assign draft survey - should return 400
- Cannot assign closed survey - should return 400
- Cannot duplicate assignment - should return 409 for duplicate assignment to same user
- Assign nonexistent survey - should return 404
- Get survey assignments - should return 200 with list of all assignments
- Filter assignments by status - should return 200 with filtered list (pending only)
- Get assignments for empty survey - should return 200 with empty list
- Get assignments for nonexistent survey - should return 404
- Get my assignments - should return 200 with list of current user's assignments
- Get my pending assignments - should return 200 with only pending assignments
- Update assignment due date - should return 200 with new due_date
- Mark assignment completed - should return 200 with status="completed" and completed_at timestamp
- Update nonexistent assignment - should return 404
- Delete assignment - should return 204 and verify removal from survey assignments
- Delete nonexistent assignment - should return 404
- Cannot delete completed assignment - should return 400

column1: Password Reset Request Test
column4:
- Successful request with existing email - should return 202
- Request with nonexistent email - should return 202 with generic message (prevent account enumeration)
- Reject invalid email format - should return 422
- Reject missing email field - should return 422
- Reject empty email string - should return 422
- Send email with reset link - should call email service with token
- Does not reveal nonexistent user - identical responses for existent/nonexistent emails
- Case insensitive email lookup - should handle uppercase/lowercase
- Include reset link in email - should contain reset-password and token
- Allow multiple reset requests for same email - should send multiple emails
- Valid token - should return valid=True
- Invalid token - should return 400 with error message
- Expired token - should return 400
- Missing token field - should return 422
- Empty token - should return 422
- Token too short - should return 422
- Success with valid token - should return 200 and clear token
- Invalid token - should return 400
- Expired token - should return 400
- Password too short - should return 422 (less than 8 characters)
- Missing token field - should return 422
- Missing password field - should return 422
- Empty password - should return 422
- Token reuse prevention - token should be invalid after first use
- Database failure - should return 400 when update fails

column1: Login Endpoint Test
column4:

- Login with invalid password - should return 401 with error detail
- Login with nonexistent email - should return 401 with error detail
- Login without email field - should return 422 validation error
- Login without password field - should return 422 validation error
- Login with empty request body - should return 422 validation error

column1: Logout Endpoint Test
column4:

- Logout endpoint rejects invalid token - should return 401
- Endpoint rejects missing token - should return 422

column1: Session Validation Test

column1: Survey Creation Test
column4:

- Get only published surveys - should return 200 with only published surveys
- Get survey by ID - should return 200 with matching survey
- Get survey with questions - should include attached questions in response

- Update survey questions - should return 200 with new question list

column1: TOTP Setup & Validation Test
column4:
- Encrypt/decrypt roundtrip - encrypt secret and recover it with same masterkey
- Token format - token should be base64url without padding and URL-safe alphabet only
- Wrong masterkey fails - should raise SecretStorageError with wrong masterkey
- Corrupt token handling - invalid base64 or JSON should raise SecretStorageError
- Payload version checks - unsupported payload version should raise SecretStorageError
- Enroll for DB - should return token and otpauth:// URI
- Verify TOTP success/failure - valid code should pass, wrong code should fail
- Reject bad code format - empty, short, long, non-numeric, or whitespace codes should fail
- Missing masterkey errors - empty masterkey should raise SecretStorageError for encrypt/decrypt/verify operations

- Missing password - should return 422 validation error
- Invalid email - should return 422 validation error

column1: Aggregation Service K-Anonymity Test
column4:

- get_question_aggregate for number type returns min, max, mean, median, std_dev, histogram
- get_question_aggregate for scale type returns integer histogram buckets
- get_question_aggregate for yesno type returns yes/no counts and percentages
- get_question_aggregate for single_choice returns option counts from QuestionOptions
- get_question_aggregate for multi_choice splits comma-separated values correctly
- get_question_aggregate for openended returns empty data (no text exposed)
- get_question_aggregate returns suppressed=true when responses < 5
- Choice option with count < 5 is marked suppressed at option level
- Nonexistent question returns None
- get_survey_aggregates applies category filter correctly
- get_survey_aggregates applies response_type filter correctly
- get_csv_export returns valid CSV string with correct columns
- get_csv_export includes suppressed rows without aggregate columns
- get_csv_export returns None for nonexistent survey
- Individual ResponseValue rows are NEVER returned in any method
- K_ANONYMITY_THRESHOLD is exactly 5
